description: Comprehensive contamination dataset for Graphite Deposit Traces. Includes chemical composition, safety metrics, PPE requirements, and laser removal parameters for effective contamination removal.

includedInDataCatalog.name: Z-Beam Contamination Removal Database
includedInDataCatalog.description: Comprehensive database of contamination removal parameters, safety data, and laser cleaning specifications

contaminant.name: Graphite Deposit Traces
contaminant.description: Graphite marks arise from carbon residues left by pencils, lubricants, or electrical contacts rubbing onto surfaces. These dark, powdery deposits stand out from rust or oils due to their conductive, non-adhesive nature that smears easily under pressure. On metals like steel or aluminum, they cling tightly yet vaporize cleanly with laser pulses, cutting removal challenges like residue buildup while preserving the base material.

fireExplosionRisk.description: Minimal fire risk with standard precautions and adequate ventilation
fireExplosionRisk.mitigation: Standard fire safety precautions, extinguisher available within 15m

toxicGasRisk.description: Carbon Monoxide and Polycyclic Aromatic Hydrocarbons (PAHs) generation - multiple toxic compounds
toxicGasRisk.mitigation: Half-face or full-face respirator with organic vapor/particulate cartridges, adequate ventilation. WARNING: Polycyclic Aromatic Hydrocarbons (PAHs) - known carcinogen(s), minimize exposure

visibilityHazard.description: Moderate visibility reduction (40-60%), significant particulate haze
visibilityHazard.mitigation: Ensure clear sight lines, use source extraction, maintain awareness of surroundings

ventilationRequirements.rationale: Standard industrial ventilation (10 ACH) for particulate control
